description: person_warnings on Thomas (I2) returns hasDeathBeforeChildBirth30_10 — male-gendered Fundamental check: Thomas's death is more than 300 days before Patrick's birth, biologically impossible for a father. The brief's flagship example. Used by ut_check_warnings_005.
